FSCSS Str Prompt Variable.description: Define a text-prompt variable that expands inline as CSS

FSCSS Str Use.description: Use a str() prompt variable inline inside a selector block

FSCSS Define Function.description: Define a reusable FSCSS function block (@define)

FSCSS Define Call.description: Call / invoke a previously @defined FSCSS function

FSCSS Use Block.description: Apply styles to a selector from within a @define block

FSCSS Fun Block.description: Create a named @fun block of reusable CSS properties

FSCSS Fun Use (full).description: Apply all properties from an @fun block

FSCSS Fun Use (property).description: Pull a single property out of an @fun block

FSCSS Fun Use (value).description: Use only the value of a specific @fun property

FSCSS Import (named).description: Named import of one module from a built-in lib or path

FSCSS Import (multi-named).description: Import multiple named modules from a lib or path

FSCSS Import (alias).description: Import a module with an alias to avoid name clashes

FSCSS Import (wildcard).description: Import everything from a lib (wildcard import)

FSCSS Import (remote URL).description: Import from a remote CDN or absolute URL

FSCSS Array Loop.description: Generate iterative CSS blocks from every array item

FSCSS Array Random (per-element).description: Pick a different random value from an array per selector

FSCSS Array Random (global compile).description: Pick ONE random value from an array for the whole compile

FSCSS Array Join.description: Join array elements into a single string with a separator

FSCSS Array List.description: Output all items of an array as a space-separated list

FSCSS Random Picker.description: Pick a random value from an inline list at compile time

FSCSS Random from Array.description: Pick a random value from a named array per invocation

FSCSS Keyframe (single selector).description: Define @keyframes and assign animation to one selector

FSCSS Keyframe (multi-selector).description: Define @keyframes and assign animation to multiple selectors at once

FSCSS Shorthand %n.description: Set N properties to the same value in one shorthand call

FSCSS exec log.description: Console log for debugging FSCSS at compile time

FSCSS exec warn.description: Console warn for debugging FSCSS at compile time

FSCSS Math Eval.description: Evaluate a math expression, e.g. num(100/4)

FSCSS Number Range.description: Generate a comma-separated number range from start to end

FSCSS Repeat Value.description: Repeat a string or value N times

FSCSS Copy Value.description: Copy a value from another property in the same block

FSCSS String Extract.description: Extract a substring from an FSCSS variable

FSCSS Event Logic.description: Conditional styling logic using FSCSS @event if/el-if/el

FSCSS HTML Script Tag.description: CDN script tag to include the FSCSS runtime in HTML

FSCSS @define + @use pattern.description: Full @define + @use mixin pattern with immediate invocation

FSCSS Themed Array + Random.description: Declare a color array and apply a random value to a selector
